reviews.comment:
Excelente estación de servicios. Muy limpio todo. Atención de 10. Muy agradable

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service station. Everything was very clean. Excellent service. Very pleasant.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBOWZHY0J3EAE

reviews.comment:
Rapidez, eficiencia. Buena atención. Única crítica: en el bar siempre hay MUCHO olor a comida.

(Translated by Google)
Fast, efficient. Good service. Only complaint: there's always a strong smell of food in the bar.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnMnJIUXV3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar, tanto el  personal de playa, como el de comidas, nuestro lugar de descanso cada vez que viajamos para Rosario o Córdoba.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place, both the beach staff and the food staff, our place to rest every time we travel to Rosario or Cordoba.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBM2FuVGZnEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente parador donde se puede conseguir todo lo q se necesita para seguir viajando por la ruta,desde agua caliente hasta golosinas y comidas,buena atención!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent rest stop where you can get everything you need to continue traveling along the route, from hot water to snacks and meals, great service!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3b2ZtZ3NBRRAB

reviews.comment:
La atención malísima, los empleados atienden según el orden que les parece, dejando a otros esperando y esperando

(Translated by Google)
The service is terrible, the employees serve in the order they see fit, leaving others waiting and waiting.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURROEoyN2NnEAE

reviews.comment:
Lo mejor que te puede pasar si tenés hambre!!!

(Translated by Google)
The best thing that can happen to you if you're hungry!!!

reviews.comment:
Completa. No tiene mucho lugar para descansar.

(Translated by Google)
Complete. There's not much room to rest.
